phrases.cultural_note: Port Hercules is one of the world's most prestigious superyacht harbors. During Monaco Yacht Show (late September), over 100 mega-yachts are on display.

responses.english: Along the docks. The best view is from the port terrace.
responses.french: Le long des quais. La meilleure vue est depuis la terrasse du port.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the Formula 1 harbor section
phrases.text_local: Quelle est la partie du port utilisée pour le Grand Prix ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah par-TEE doo por ee-tee-lee-ZAY poor luh grahn PREE
phrases.cultural_note: The harbor forms part of the Monaco F1 circuit — the tunnel section and harborfront straight are among the most dramatic race moments.

responses.english: The port straight and the tunnel are part of the circuit.
responses.french: La ligne droite du port et le tunnel font partie du circuit.

phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il de bons restaurants au bord du port ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL duh bonz res-toh-RAHN oh bor doo por
phrases.cultural_note: The waterfront has several upscale restaurants and cafés. Prices are high (this is Monaco), but the setting is unparalleled.

responses.english: Yes, there are several restaurants along the dock.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ahn plu-ZYUR dahn luh kar-TYAY
responses.french: Oui, il y a plusieurs restaurants le long du quai.

phrases.cultural_note: The Monaco Yacht Show (September) is the premier superyacht exhibition. Visits are by invitation only for most displays.

responses.english: The Monaco Yacht Show is in September. Check online.
responses.french: Le Monaco Yacht Show a lieu en septembre. Il faut vérifier en ligne.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the passenger ferry to other cities
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on prendre un ferry vers d'autres villes ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TOHN prondr un fer-EE vair dah-truh VEEL
phrases.cultural_note: Ferries connect Monaco to Nice, Cannes, and other French Riviera destinations. Check theTMS (Transports Monégasques) schedule.

responses.english: At the bus station on Avenue de la Porte Neuve, near downtown.
responses.phonetic: eel foh oon VEST ay oon krah-VAHT poor lay may-SYUR
responses.french: À la gare routière, Avenue de la Porte Neuve, près du centre-ville.
